---
title: "Dora Leeke"
---

## Dora Leeke

**Dates:** (b. 1852)

**Maiden name:** (Wordsworth)

### Description

sister of Elizabeth Wordsworth

### Biography

She married (1880) Edward Leeke. [Battiscombe, <i>Reluctant Pioneer</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 30th 1874

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
